nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner for accuracy
nodes.label_negative: AI as independent delegator without oversight
nodes.grounding_span: I am more likely to collaborate with the AI throughout development of the activity, because I want to make sure the information provided is accurate

nodes.label: AI as efficiency tool for tight deadlines
nodes.grounding_span: I try to rely on AI as much as possible because I have very tight deadlines to meet

nodes.label: AI creativity and novelty in suggestions
nodes.grounding_span: the ideas provided by AI are typical, repetitive, and less than engaging

nodes.label: Human expertise for prompt crafting and review
nodes.label_negative: Over-reliance on AI without human skill
nodes.grounding_span: it is necessary for me to remain knowledgeable. That way I can create the right types of prompts and check the information provided by AI

nodes.label: Educational quality and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: I want to make sure the information provided is accurate and that the instructions make sense

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: I try to rely on AI as much as possible because I have very tight deadlines to meet

nodes.label: Professional growth and skill development
nodes.grounding_span: I am constantly improving my skills or learning new ones

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for most tasks
nodes.grounding_span: For the most part I have been satisfied when using AI at work

nodes.label: Frustration with repetitive AI suggestions
nodes.grounding_span: the ideas provided by AI are typical, repetitive, and less than engaging

nodes.label: Optimism about growing AI relationship
nodes.grounding_span: I expect my relationship with AI at work to continue to grow

nodes.label: Iterative combinatorial strategy — combines elements from multiple AI suggestions
nodes.grounding_span: I request a minimum of three ideas at a time. Then, I am able to combine different elements from each idea to create a more engaging activity

nodes.label: Proactive skill maintenance to enable effective AI collaboration
nodes.grounding_span: I am constantly improving my skills or learning new ones. I feel this is important in order to work collaboratively with AI
